metadata.title: SpiceHubVN - The World of Vietnamese Spices
metadata.description: Discover the rich world of Vietnamese spices. Detailed information about various spices and unique cooking recipes.

hero.title: The World of
hero.subtitle: Explore the rich and diverse treasure of Vietnamese spices. From the sweet aroma of cinnamon to the fiery heat of chili, each jar of spice tells a story of culinary culture.

features.title: Why Choose SpiceHubVN?
features.subtitle: We bring the most comprehensive spice discovery experience for Vietnamese food lovers.

items.title: Spice Encyclopedia
items.description: Detailed information about hundreds of Vietnamese spices including origins, uses, and preparation methods.

items.title: Cooking Recipes
items.description: Thousands of traditional and modern recipes with detailed step-by-step instructions.

items.title: Health & Nutrition
items.description: Learn about health benefits of each spice and how to combine them effectively.

items.title: Spice Map
items.description: Explore the distribution map of spices by region, from North to South.

items.title: Chef Community
items.description: Connect with the cooking community, share experiences and secret tips.

items.title: Easy Shopping
items.description: Find and purchase quality spices from trusted suppliers across Vietnam.

about.title: The SpiceHubVN Story
about.description: SpiceHubVN was born from a passion for Vietnamese cuisine and the desire to preserve and develop traditional spice culture. We believe every great meal starts with wonderful spices.

cta.title: Ready to Explore?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of Vietnamese food lovers on the spice discovery journey.
cta.note: No credit card required • Free forever

footer.description: Vietnam's leading spice discovery and cooking recipe platform.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Have a question or want to collaborate? Leave your details and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.

chat.greeting: Hello! 👋 Welcome to SpiceHubVN. How can we help you?

sections.title: 1. Information Collection
sections.content: We collect information you provide directly when using SpiceHubVN services, including: name, email address, and account-related information. We also automatically collect certain technical information such as IP address, browser type, and access time.

sections.title: 2. Use of Information
sections.content: Collected information is used to: provide and improve services, personalize user experience, send notifications about updates and offers (if subscribed), analyze usage trends to improve content quality.

sections.title: 3. Information Protection
sections.content: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, use, or disclosure. However, no method of data transmission over the Internet is absolutely secure.

sections.title: 4. Information Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell, trade, or transfer your personal information to third parties, except with your consent or as required by law.

sections.title: 5. Cookies
sections.content: The website uses cookies to improve the browsing experience. You can choose to decline cookies through your browser settings, however this may affect some website functionalities.

sections.title: 6. Contact
sections.content: If you have questions about the privacy policy, please contact us via email: privacy@spicehubvn.com

sections.title: 1. General Terms
sections.content: By accessing and using SpiceHubVN.com, you agree to comply with the terms and conditions outlined in this document. If you disagree with any part, please do not use our services.

sections.title: 2. Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content on SpiceHubVN including text, images, graphics, logos, and software is owned by SpiceHubVN or licensed partners. Copying, distributing, or using content without written consent is prohibited.

sections.title: 3. User Accounts
sections.content: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your login information and all activities under your account. Please notify us immediately if you discover any unauthorized access.

sections.title: 4. User Content
sections.content: When posting content on SpiceHubVN (recipes, reviews, comments), you grant us the right to use, display, and distribute that content on the platform. You must ensure your content does not infringe third-party rights.

sections.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: SpiceHubVN provides spice information and cooking recipes for reference purposes. We are not responsible for any damages arising from the use of information on the website, including health issues or food allergies.

sections.title: 6. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Changes will take effect immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
